SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery.models

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.models.User
public class User extends Object
Role: Data Model / Entity Purpose: Represents a system user within the application. This class acts as a structured data container for profile information, role-based access control, and Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) tokens. It includes utility methods for generating UI-ready data like name-based initials. Design Pattern: Data Transfer Object (DTO). This class facilitates the mapping of Firestore documents into local Java objects. Encapsulates all data related to a user profile, including authentication metadata, contact details, and system permissions.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User()
      Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore deserialization. Initializes the roles list, enables push notifications by default, and sets the creation timestamp to the current time.

    • User

      public User(String name, String email, String phone, List<String> roles, String deviceId)
      Constructs a new User with specified profile and device details.
      Parameters:
      name - The display name of the user.
      email - The email address (will be converted to lowercase).
      phone - The contact phone number.
      roles - A list of assigned system roles.
      deviceId - The unique identifier for the user's hardware device.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      The unique Firestore document ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - The unique Firestore document ID to set.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      The display name of the user.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the user's name and automatically updates the lowercase version for search.
      Parameters:
      name - The display name to set.

    • getNameLowercase

      public String getNameLowercase()
      Returns:
      The lowercase name used for case-insensitive database queries.

    • setNameLowercase

      public void setNameLowercase(String nameLowercase)
      Parameters:
      nameLowercase - The lowercase name to set.

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns:
      The user's email address.

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the email address, ensuring it is stored in lowercase.
      Parameters:
      email - The email address to set.

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns:
      The user's phone number.

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Parameters:
      phone - The phone number to set.

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Returns:
      The user's account password.

    • setPassword

      public void setPassword(String password)
      Parameters:
      password - The password to set.

    • getRoles

      public List<String> getRoles()
      Returns:
      The list of roles assigned to the user.

    • setRoles

      public void setRoles(List<String> roles)
      Parameters:
      roles - The list of roles to set.

    • isPushNotificationsEnabled

      public boolean isPushNotificationsEnabled()
      Returns:
      True if the user has opted into push notifications.

    • setPushNotificationsEnabled

      public void setPushNotificationsEnabled(boolean pushNotificationsEnabled)
      Parameters:
      pushNotificationsEnabled - The notification preference status.

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Returns:
      The unique ID of the user's device.

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The device ID to set.

    • getFcmToken

      public String getFcmToken()
      Returns:
      The Firebase Cloud Messaging registration token.

    • setFcmToken

      public void setFcmToken(String fcmToken)
      Parameters:
      fcmToken - The FCM token to set.

    • getCreatedAt

      public long getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      The epoch timestamp when the user profile was created.

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(long createdAt)
      Parameters:
      createdAt - The creation timestamp to set.

    • hasRole

      public boolean hasRole(String role)
      Helper method to verify if the user possesses a specific system role.
      Parameters:
      role - The role string to check (e.g., "admin").
      Returns:
      True if the user has the specified role, false otherwise.

    • getInitials

      public String getInitials()
      Extracts and formats initials from the user's name for UI avatar placeholders.
      Returns:
      A capitalized string of initials (e.g., "JD" for "John Doe"), or "?" if invalid.
